name: eulr-contract
description: Eulr contract backend built with Foundry, Anvil, and TypeScript.

scripts.test:fork:xlayer: test -n "$XLAYER_RPC_URL" || (echo 'XLAYER_RPC_URL is required' >&2; exit 1); XLAYER_CHAIN_ID=196 forge test --match-path 'test/fork/*' --fork-url $XLAYER_RPC_URL
scripts.ci: forge fmt --check && forge build && forge test --fuzz-runs 10000 && forge test --match-path 'test/invariant/*' && forge test --match-path 'test/fork/*' && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run test:ts && npm run coverage:95 && npm run slither
scripts.script:deploy-xlayer: GIT_COMMIT=${GIT_COMMIT:-$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)} DEPLOYED_AT=${DEPLOYED_AT:-$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")} DEPLOYMENT_NETWORK=${DEPLOYMENT_NETWORK:-xlayer} forge script script/DeployFactory.s.sol:DeployFactory --rpc-url $XLAYER_RPC_URL --broadcast --verify
scripts.deploy:anvil: DEPLOYMENT_NETWORK=anvil tsx ts/deploy/00-check-chain.ts && DEPLOYMENT_NETWORK=anvil tsx ts/deploy/01-deploy-factory.ts && DEPLOYMENT_NETWORK=anvil tsx ts/deploy/02-write-deployment.ts
scripts.deploy:hashkeytest: DEPLOYMENT_NETWORK=hashkeytest tsx ts/deploy/00-check-chain.ts && DEPLOYMENT_NETWORK=hashkeytest tsx ts/deploy/01-deploy-factory.ts && DEPLOYMENT_NETWORK=hashkeytest tsx ts/deploy/02-write-deployment.ts
scripts.smoke:anvil: npm run deploy:anvil && npm run create-token -- --name Demo --symbol DEMO --metadata-uri ipfs://demo --curve-s 25 --fee-bps 30 && npm run quote:buy -- --okb 1 && npm run buy -- --okb 1 --min-out 0 --allow-zero-min-out && npm run quote:sell -- --tokens 1 && npm run sell -- --tokens 1 --min-out 0 --allow-zero-min-out && npm run simulate:graduation && npm run migrate:liquidity && npm run claim:fees
scripts.smoke:anvil:v4-sell-tax-config: npm run build && DEPLOYMENT_NETWORK=anvil tsx ts/cli/smoke-v4-sell-tax-config-anvil.ts
scripts.smoke:anvil:dual-tax: npm run deploy:anvil && npm run create-token-and-buy -- --name DualTax --symbol DUAL --metadata-uri ipfs://dual-tax --curve-s 25 --fee-bps 75 --buy-okb 1 && npm run quote:buy -- --okb 1 && npm run buy -- --okb 1 --min-out 0 --allow-zero-min-out && npm run quote:sell -- --tokens 1 && npm run sell -- --tokens 1 --min-out 0 --allow-zero-min-out && tsx ts/cli/smoke-dynamic-tax-anvil.ts
scripts.smoke:anvil:hook-upgrade: DEPLOYMENT_NETWORK=anvil npm run deploy:anvil && DEPLOYMENT_NETWORK=anvil npm run upgrade:hook-architecture && DEPLOYMENT_NETWORK=anvil npm run create-token-and-buy -- --name HookUpgrade --symbol HUP --metadata-uri ipfs://hook-upgrade --curve-s 25 --buy-okb 1 && DEPLOYMENT_NETWORK=anvil npm run upgrade:hooks -- --all && DEPLOYMENT_NETWORK=anvil tsx ts/cli/smoke-hook-upgrade-anvil.ts
scripts.smoke:hashkeytest:accounts: npm run build && DEPLOYMENT_NETWORK=hashkeytest tsx ts/cli/smoke-hashkeytest-accounts.ts
